베드로후서 1:1.content: Simon Peter, a servant and apostle of Jesus Christ, to those who have obtained a like precious faith with us in the righteousness of our God and Savior, Jesus Christ:

베드로후서 1:2.content: Grace to you and peace be multiplied in the knowledge of God and of Jesus our Lord,

베드로후서 1:3.content: seeing that his divine power has granted to us all things that pertain to life and godliness, through the knowledge of him who called us by his own glory and virtue,

베드로후서 1:4.content: by which he has granted to us his precious and exceedingly great promises; that through these you may become partakers of the divine nature, having escaped from the corruption that is in the world by lust.

베드로후서 1:5.content: Yes, and for this very cause adding on your part all diligence, in your faith supply moral excellence; and in moral excellence, knowledge;

베드로후서 1:6.content: and in knowledge, self-control; and in self-control perseverance; and in perseverance godliness;

베드로후서 1:7.content: and in godliness brotherly affection; and in brotherly affection, love.

베드로후서 1:8.content: For if these things are yours and abound, they make you to not be idle or unfruitful in the knowledge of our Lord Jesus Christ.

베드로후서 1:9.content: For he who lacks these things is blind, seeing only what is near, having forgotten the cleansing from his old sins.

베드로후서 1:10.content: Therefore, brothers, be more diligent to make your calling and election sure. For if you do these things, you will never stumble.

베드로후서 1:11.content: For thus you will be richly supplied with the entrance into the eternal Kingdom of our Lord and Savior, Jesus Christ.

베드로후서 1:12.content: Therefore I will not be negligent to remind you of these things, though you know them, and are established in the present truth.

베드로후서 1:13.content: I think it right, as long as I am in this tent, to stir you up by reminding you,

베드로후서 1:14.content: knowing that the putting off of my tent comes swiftly, even as our Lord Jesus Christ made clear to me.

베드로후서 1:15.content: Yes, I will make every effort that you may always be able to remember these things even after my departure.

베드로후서 1:16.content: For we didn’t follow cunningly devised fables when we made known to you the power and coming of our Lord Jesus Christ, but we were eyewitnesses of his majesty.

베드로후서 1:17.content: For he received from God the Father honor and glory when the voice came to him from the Majestic Glory, “This is my beloved Son, in whom I am well pleased.”

베드로후서 1:18.content: We heard this voice come out of heaven when we were with him on the holy mountain.

베드로후서 1:19.content: We have the more sure word of prophecy; and you do well that you heed it, as to a lamp shining in a dark place, until the day dawns, and the morning star arises in your hearts:

베드로후서 1:20.content: knowing this first, that no prophecy of Scripture is of private interpretation.

베드로후서 1:21.content: For no prophecy ever came by the will of man: but holy men of God spoke, being moved by the Holy Spirit.
